languages.text: "Перед ликом Его все равны — посему каждое Дитя искупляет свою вину перед Императором. Все тянут жребий — и избранные Им отправляются в лабиринты над нашими головами в поисках припасов... пропитания... и надежды. Только в вечном искуплении за свои грехи мы находим смысл".

traits.locale_text: "Перед ликом Его все равны — посему каждое Дитя искупляет свою вину перед Императором. Все тянут жребий — и избранные Им отправляются в лабиринты над нашими головами в поисках припасов... пропитания... и надежды. Только в вечном искуплении за свои грехи мы находим смысл".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "Everyone is equal before His face — and so every Child atones for their faults before the Emperor. We cast lots, and the ones chosen by Him venture into the labyrinths above to look for supplies... nourishment... and hope. It is in seeking to atone that we find purpose."
languages.original_text: "Перед ликом Его все равны — посему каждое Дитя искупляет свою вину перед Императором. Все тянут жребий — и избранные Им отправляются в лабиринты над нашими головами в поисках припасов... пропитания... и надежды. Только в вечном искуплении за свои грехи мы находим смысл".

traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "Vor Seinem Angesicht sind alle gleich — und so büßt jedes Kind für seine Fehler vor dem Kaiser. Wir werfen Lose, und die von Ihm Auserwählten wagen sich in die Labyrinthe darüber, um nach Vorräten zu suchen ... nach Nahrung ... und Hoffnung. Indem wir zu sühnen suchen, finden wir einen Sinn."
languages.original_text: "Everyone is equal before His face — and so every Child atones for their faults before the Emperor. We cast lots, and the ones chosen by Him venture into the labyrinths above to look for supplies... nourishment... and hope. It is in seeking to atone that we find purpose."

languages.text: "Tout le monde est égal devant Sa face — et chaque enfant expie ses fautes devant l'Empereur. Nous tirons au sort, et ceux qu'Il choisit s'aventurent dans les labyrinthes d'en haut à la recherche de provisions, de nourriture et d'espoir. C'est en cherchant à expier que nous trouvons notre raison d'être."
languages.original_text: "Everyone is equal before His face — and so every Child atones for their faults before the Emperor. We cast lots, and the ones chosen by Him venture into the labyrinths above to look for supplies... nourishment... and hope. It is in seeking to atone that we find purpose."

languages.text: "在他面前人人平等--因此每个孩子都要在皇帝面前赎罪。我们抓阄，被皇帝选中的人就会进入迷宫，寻找补给......营养......和希望。在寻求赎罪的过程中，我们找到了目标。"
languages.original_text: "Everyone is equal before His face — and so every Child atones for their faults before the Emperor. We cast lots, and the ones chosen by Him venture into the labyrinths above to look for supplies... nourishment... and hope. It is in seeking to atone that we find purpose."

languages.text: "Todos somos iguales ante Su rostro, y por eso cada Niño expía sus faltas ante el Emperador. Echamos suertes, y los elegidos por Él se aventuran en los laberintos de arriba en busca de provisiones... alimento... y esperanza. Es en la búsqueda de la expiación donde encontramos el propósito".
languages.original_text: "Everyone is equal before His face — and so every Child atones for their faults before the Emperor. We cast lots, and the ones chosen by Him venture into the labyrinths above to look for supplies... nourishment... and hope. It is in seeking to atone that we find purpose."

languages.text: "皇帝の御前では、誰もが平等である" "だから、どの子も皇帝の御前で過ちを償うのだ私たちはくじを引き、皇帝に選ばれた者は、物資を求め、栄養を求め、希望を求めて、迷宮に分け入る。償いを求めることで、私たちは目的を見出すのだ。"
languages.original_text: "Everyone is equal before His face — and so every Child atones for their faults before the Emperor. We cast lots, and the ones chosen by Him venture into the labyrinths above to look for supplies... nourishment... and hope. It is in seeking to atone that we find purpose."

languages.text: "O'nun huzurunda herkes eşittir — ve bu yüzden her Çocuk İmparator'un huzurunda hatalarının kefaretini öder. Kura çekeriz ve O'nun tarafından seçilenler yukarıdaki labirentlere girerek erzak, besin ve umut ararlar. Kefaret ödemek için çabalarken bir amaç buluruz."
languages.original_text: "Everyone is equal before His face — and so every Child atones for their faults before the Emperor. We cast lots, and the ones chosen by Him venture into the labyrinths above to look for supplies... nourishment... and hope. It is in seeking to atone that we find purpose."
